goal: bundled_ideal_subset[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i), ideal_image[R, S](f, i))
bundled_ideal_subset[R](i, ideal_preimage[R, S](f, ideal_image[R, S](f, i)))
bundled_ideal_subset[R](ideal_preimage[R, S](f, j), ideal_preimage[R, S](f, j))
bundled_ideal_subset[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, ideal_preimage[R, S](f, j)), j)
bundled_ideal_subset[R](j, ideal_preimage[R, S](f, ideal_image[R, S](f, j)))
bundled_ideal_subset[R](i, ideal_preimage[R, S](f, ideal_image[R, S](f, j)))
bundled_ideal_subset[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i), ideal_image[R, S](f, j))

p.c: function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { ideal_preimage[T0, T1](x0, Ideal.zero[T1]) = ring_hom_kernel[T0, T1](x0) }[R, S](f)

goal: bundled_ideal_subset[S](ideal_image[R, S](f, i), Ideal.zero[S]) = bundled_ideal_subset[R](i, ring_hom_kernel[R, S](f))
ring_hom_kernel[R, T](compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](f, g)) = ideal_preimage[R, S](g, ring_hom_kernel[S, T](f))
bundled_ideal_subset[S](ideal_image[R, S](g, i), ring_hom_kernel[S, T](f)) = bundled_ideal_subset[R](i, ring_hom_kernel[R, T](compose_ring_hom[R, S, T](f, g)))
